text:
On Fri, Feb 12, 2010 at 11:47:36PM -0800, Stanislav Sedov wrote:
> Hi!
>
> Are you sure your ports up to date?  This bug was present in the  
> original update, but was
> fixed a long time ago.

Ah ha; apparently portmaster's idea of cleaning was insufficient to rid the
build tree of the cruft left over from the first time at building.  Lesson
learned; thank you.

--nwf;
